question.label: Energy levels
question.name: How do you feel about your energy levels as we move toward the billing rewrite? Any concerns or adjustments needed?
question.description: Seeks to assess their energy and motivation levels in light of upcoming changes.

answer: I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.

assessment.note: Priya feels unfulfilled in mentoring opportunities, indicating a strong signal of stagnation.

new_queue.label: Upcoming billing rewrite
new_queue.name: What are your initial thoughts on the upcoming billing rewrite? Are there specific challenges or contributions you foresee?

new_queue.label: Recognizing contributions
new_queue.name: What aspect of the payments refactor are you most proud of, and how do you think it impacted the team?

new_queue.label: Exploring mentoring
new_queue.name: How can we better support your interest in mentoring? What steps would you like to see taken?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week

Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
